scripts.predev:h5: npm run sync:builtin-theme-plugins && npm run clean:generated-js
scripts.prebuild:h5: npm run sync:builtin-theme-plugins && npm run clean:generated-js
scripts.prebuild:rn: npm run sync:builtin-theme-plugins && npm run clean:generated-js
scripts.prebuild:harmony: npm run sync:builtin-theme-plugins && npm run clean:generated-js
scripts.pretypecheck: npm run sync:builtin-theme-plugins && npm run clean:generated-js && npm run check:style-guard
scripts.test:plugin-theme-runtime: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Remove-Item -Recurse -Force '.tmp/plugin-theme-runtime-tests' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; & '.\node_modules\.bin\tsc.cmd' -p tsconfig.plugin-theme-tests.json; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; node --test '.tmp/plugin-theme-runtime-tests/__tests__/themeRuntime.test.js'"
scripts.test:voiceprint: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Remove-Item -Recurse -Force '.tmp/voiceprint-tests' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; & '.\node_modules\.bin\tsc.cmd' -p tsconfig.voiceprint-tests.json; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; node --test '.tmp/voiceprint-tests/pages/settings/components/__tests__/speakerVoiceprintHelpers.test.js' '.tmp/voiceprint-tests/pages/settings/components/__tests__/speakerVoiceprintComponents.test.js'"
scripts.test:integration-sync: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Remove-Item -Recurse -Force '.tmp/integration-sync-tests' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; & '.\node_modules\.bin\tsc.cmd' -p tsconfig.integration-sync-tests.json; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; node --test '.tmp/integration-sync-tests/integrations/__tests__/integrationSyncHelpers.test.js'"
scripts.test:plugins-page: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Remove-Item -Recurse -Force '.tmp/plugins-page-tests' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; & '.\node_modules\.bin\tsc.cmd' -p tsconfig.plugins-page-tests.json; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; node --test '.tmp/plugins-page-tests/plugins/__tests__/pluginStateGuards.test.js'"
scripts.test:guide-runtime: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Remove-Item -Recurse -Force '.tmp/guide-runtime-tests' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; & '.\node_modules\.bin\tsc.cmd' -p tsconfig.guide-runtime-tests.json; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; node --test '.tmp/guide-runtime-tests/__tests__/runtime.test.js' '.tmp/guide-runtime-tests/__tests__/localState.test.js'"
